name: atractylenolide i
summary: Primary sesquiterpene lactone from Atractylodes macrocephala root with NF-κB inhibitory and immunomodulatory activity. Used in TCM formulas; primarily preclinical evidence base.
description: Primary sesquiterpene lactone from Atractylodes macrocephala root with NF-κB inhibitory and immunomodulatory activity. Used in TCM formulas; primarily preclinical evidence base.
safetyNotes: Evidence for isolated atractylenolide I is primarily in vitro and animal-based. A review noted possible metabolic-enzyme inhibition as a research concern, but human dose-response, pregnancy, breastfeeding, liver, kidney, surgery, and medication-interaction safety have not been established.

claimMap.claim: Mechanism/background only; do not publish clinical benefit claims without human evidence.
claimMap.notes: Mechanism/background only; do not publish clinical benefit claims without human evidence.

safety: Safety evidence: review-level evidence is primarily in vitro and animal-based. Possible metabolic-enzyme inhibition is a research concern, not an established clinical interaction; human dose-response, pregnancy, breastfeeding, liver, kidney, surgery, and medication-interaction safety remain insufficient.

sources.title: Atractylenolides (I, II, and III): a review of their pharmacology and pharmacokinetics.
sources.citation: Author not retrieved (2021). Arch Pharm Res. PMID: 34269984. DOI: 10.1007/s12272-021-01342-6.
